ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, satellite) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that collected the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature */,
  "temp_avg" REAL /* Average temperature */,
  "temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature */,
  "dew_max" REAL /* Maximum dew point */,
  "dew_avg" REAL /* Average dew point */,
  "dew_min" REAL /* Minimum dew point */,
  "humid_max" REAL /* Maximum humidity */,
  "humid_avg" REAL /* Average humidity */,
  "humid_min" REAL /* Minimum humidity */,
  "wind_max" REAL /* Maximum wind speed */,
  "wind_avg" REAL /* Average wind speed */,
  "wind_min" REAL /* Minimum wind speed */,
  "pressure_max" REAL /* Maximum atmospheric pressure */,
  "pressure_avg" REAL /* Average atmospheric pressure */,
  "pressure_min" REAL /* Minimum atmospheric pressure */,
  "precipitation_total" REAL /* Total precipitation */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the data quality metric */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the data quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being validated */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the data validation rule */,
  "rule_value" REAL /* Value of the data validation rule */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the data validation rule (e.g., >, <, =) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being exported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the forecast is for */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_data" TEXT /* Forecast data in JSON format */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the weather forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apiintegrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API integration */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the external API or service */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for authentication */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for authentication */,
  "url" TEXT /* Base URL of the API */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was made */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the sensor is installed at */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date the reading was taken */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES weather_station_sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ingestion" (
  "ingestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data ingestion event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being ingested */,
  "ingestion_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was ingested */,
  "ingestion_method" TEXT /* Method used for data ingestion (e.g., API, file upload) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingestion_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
